segment.source: A row of up to four plan cards, each with title, price, rich-text description, check-mark feature list, and button; the featured plan gets a recommended ribbon and a filled button. Use it for: pricing sections with four distinct tiers, such as free-starter-pro-enterprise ladders. Prefer 'Three Tier Pricing' or 'Two Tier Pricing' for fewer plans; use 'Pricing Section' when the column count should stay selectable or plans need billing-period labels.
